title: trifolium filiforme subsp. dubium
intro: Trifolium filiforme subsp. dubium, also known as slender white clover, is a perennial legume native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of slender white clover include its ability to support the cardiovascular system and lower blood pressure, as well as its potential to improve digestive health. Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of this plant are used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
